name: Reasonable Cause Exception for S Corporation Late Filing

eligibility.description: Available to S corporations that fail to file Form 1120-S on time but can prove the delay was due to circumstances beyond their control.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid the per-shareholder monthly penalty for failing to file an S corporation return by demonstrating that the failure was due to reasonable cause.
